items.name: Marsec Munition Factory Dual MiniGun Black
items.description:
More Accessories here!
https://www.roblox.com/communities/16547842/Akari-Outpost-8#!/store

Originally tailored for mechanized infantry, this stalwart apparatus has transcended its origins, finding widespread adoption for its resilience and ease of maintenance. Whether donned by organic operators in power suits or integrated into mechanized units, its enduring durability remains unmatched.

The ability to swiftly accommodate various weapon mounts, offering adaptability even in the heat of battle. Its expansive design, housing a robust magazine and manufacturing unit, ensures a steady stream of ammunition production, making it ideal for prolonged missions where resupply is uncertain.

This variant is mounted with dual miniguns and can be calibrated to manufacture armor piercing, explosive or incendiary rounds. Though this setup can be devastating its payload is short lived so is best being backed up with a primary weapon while the Munition Factory can resupply its magazine.
